description: AICPA Trust Services Criteria used in SOC 2 examinations. Includes common criteria (CC) and criteria for the four additional categories.

controls.name: Commitment to Integrity and Ethical Values
controls.summary: The entity demonstrates a commitment to integrity and ethical values.

controls.name: Board Independence and Oversight
controls.summary: The board of directors demonstrates independence from management and exercises oversight of internal control.

controls.name: Organizational Structure and Authority
controls.summary: Management establishes structures, reporting lines, and authorities in pursuit of objectives.

controls.name: Relevant Quality Information
controls.summary: The entity obtains or generates and uses relevant, quality information to support internal control.

controls.name: Internal Communication
controls.summary: The entity internally communicates information necessary to support the functioning of internal control.

controls.name: Objectives Specification
controls.summary: The entity specifies objectives with sufficient clarity to enable identification and assessment of risks.

controls.name: Risk Identification and Analysis
controls.summary: The entity identifies risks and analyzes them as a basis for determining how risks should be managed.

controls.name: Ongoing Evaluations
controls.summary: The entity selects, develops, and performs ongoing and/or separate evaluations to ascertain whether components of internal control are present.

controls.name: Control Activities Selection and Development
controls.summary: The entity selects and develops control activities that contribute to the mitigation of risks to acceptable levels.

controls.name: Logical Access Controls
controls.summary: The entity implements logical access security software, infrastructure, and architectures over protected information.

controls.name: User Registration and Authorization
controls.summary: Prior to issuing system credentials, the entity registers and authorizes new users.

controls.name: Role-Based Access
controls.summary: The entity authorizes, modifies, or removes access based on roles, responsibilities, or the system design.

controls.name: External Boundary Protection
controls.summary: The entity implements logical access security measures to protect against threats from outside its system boundaries.

controls.name: Restricted Information Movement
controls.summary: The entity restricts the transmission, movement, and removal of information to authorized internal and external users.

controls.name: Malicious Software Prevention
controls.summary: The entity implements controls to prevent or detect and act upon the introduction of unauthorized or malicious software.

controls.name: Vulnerability Detection
controls.summary: The entity uses detection and monitoring procedures to identify changes to configurations that introduce vulnerabilities.

controls.name: System Monitoring
controls.summary: The entity monitors system components for anomalies indicative of malicious acts, natural disasters, and errors.

controls.name: Security Event Evaluation
controls.summary: The entity evaluates security events to determine whether they could result in a failure to meet objectives.

controls.name: Incident Response
controls.summary: The entity responds to identified security incidents by executing a defined incident response program.

controls.name: Recovery from Incidents
controls.summary: The entity identifies, develops, and implements activities to recover from identified security incidents.

controls.name: Change Management
controls.summary: The entity authorizes, designs, develops, configures, documents, tests, approves, and implements changes to infrastructure, data, software.

controls.name: Risk Mitigation Activities
controls.summary: The entity identifies, selects, and develops risk mitigation activities for risks arising from potential business disruptions.

controls.name: Vendor Risk Management
controls.summary: The entity assesses and manages risks associated with vendors and business partners.

controls.name: Capacity Management
controls.summary: The entity maintains, monitors, and evaluates current processing capacity to manage capacity demand.

controls.name: Environmental Protections
controls.summary: The entity authorizes, designs, develops, implements, operates, approves, maintains, and monitors environmental protections.

controls.name: Recovery Plan Testing
controls.summary: The entity tests recovery plan procedures supporting system recovery to meet its objectives.

controls.name: Confidential Information Identification
controls.summary: The entity identifies and maintains confidential information to meet the entity's objectives related to confidentiality.

controls.name: Confidential Information Disposal
controls.summary: The entity disposes of confidential information to meet the entity's objectives related to confidentiality.
